arts.ttl: Napoli & Juventus Set Sights on Verona Rising Star
arts.sum: Hellas Verona wingback Jackson Tchatchoua has reportedly drawn inquiries from several top clubs, including Napoli and Juventus. According to Calciomercato, the two Serie A heavyweights have dispatched scouts to monitor the 22-year-old's progress at Stadio Marc'Antonio Bentegodi. The post Napoli & Juventus Set Sights on Verona Rising Star appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Napoli and Juventus battle for Verona’s rising star Tchatchoua
arts.sum: Verona’s sporting director Sean Sogliano has once again demonstrated his talent for unearthing hidden gems in the transfer market. His latest discovery, Jackson Tchatchoua, was acquired from Charleroi for a mere €2 million and has quickly become a valuable asset for the club. Calciomercato report on how Tchatchoua’s rapid rise to prominence has caught the attention of several top clubs, with Napoli showing strong interest in the young right-back. The Partenopei are reportedly ready to make a move for the Cameroonian as early as January, seeing him as a potential reinforcement for their squad. arts.ttl: Serie A | Lazio v Verona: Match Preview
arts.sum: Lazio will look to build momentum when they welcome Hellas Verona to the Stadio Olimpico on Monday evening. After an up-and-down start to the campaign, the Biancocelesti aim to secure their second home victory of the young season. Surprisingly, Verona currently sit above Lazio in the table following an impressive opening to their campaign. The visitors have taken six points from their first three matches, including a stunning 3-0 win over Napoli on opening day. Lazio enter the match on the back of a thrilling 2-2 draw with AC Milan before the international break. arts.ttl: Lazio Working on Extending the Contract of Napoli Target
arts.sum: Lazio have already started the procedure to renew the contract of Adam Marusic who is now one of the few remaining senators at the club following the summer revamp. The 31-year-old has been a loyal servant to the cause since joining the Italian capital side in the summer of 2017.
